title: Bucket of Life!
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a bucket of life-giving water. Stay hydrated, stay alive!
body:
#  Introducing the **Bucket of Life**
 - a fun twist on the classic **Totem of Undying**.
Who needs _golden idols_ when you can clutch victory with a refreshing bucket of water?
  
This pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a bucket of life-giving water, turning every close call into a splashy reminder: hydration is the key to survival. Whether you’re fighting the Ender Dragon, exploring the depths of a cave, or just surviving creeper ambushes, the Bucket of Life will always have your back.
